name: paddleocr-text-recognition
tagline: CLI wrapper that extracts line/box-level text (OCR) from images, screenshots, and scanned PDFs via the PaddleOCR text-recognition API.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill: clear trigger terms, an explicit 'do not use for' exclusion, concrete commands, a shown output schema, and error guidance. Only real gaps are no version/changelog signal and an unpinned install of the paddleocr package.

highlights.summary: official uv install of well-known package but no version pin — 'latest' drift risk.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
